title: High stakes battle in Bhabua as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Bhabua. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Political rally in Bhabua draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Bhabua promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Bhabua
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Bhabua assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
